About.pageSubtitle: Your trusted partner in specialized air compressors for the laser industry
About.companyIntro: Diamond CNC Technology Co., Ltd (Jingang) was established in 2015, specializing in premium water-cooled screw air compressor solutions for the laser industry.
About.missionText: Deliver world-class industrial compressed air solutions with superior performance, high durability, and optimal energy efficiency.
About.visionText: To become the leading supplier of specialized air compressor equipment for the laser industry in Southeast Asia.
About.reason1Text: ISO 9001:2015 certified products, rigorously tested before delivery.
About.reason2Text: Experienced technical team ready to assist anytime, anywhere.
About.reason3Text: Direct factory import, no middlemen, ensuring the best prices.

News.pageSubtitle: Stay updated with the latest product launches, technology insights, and industry trends
News.news1Title: Launching the New Generation 15KW Integrated Air Compressor
News.news1Summary: KINKONAC introduces the 15KW integrated air compressor with auto-cleaning radiator technology for enhanced operational efficiency.
News.news2Summary: A comprehensive guide on periodic maintenance steps to keep your air compressor running efficiently for years.
News.news3Summary: KINKONAC brings the most advanced air compressor solutions for the laser industry to the exhibition in Vietnam.

Footer.description: Leading provider of specialized air compressor solutions for the laser industry in Vietnam.
